scripts.build: npm run build:rdf-html && npm run build:navigator && npm run build:extension && npm run build:hare-viewer && npm run build:site
scripts.check: npm --prefix packages/rdf-html run check && npm run check:rdf-html-examples && npm --prefix packages/html-rdf-navigator run check && npm --prefix packages/browser-extension run check && npm --prefix packages/hare-viewer run check && node --check worker.js
scripts.dev: npm run build && wrangler dev --var RDF_HTML_ALLOW_LOCALHOST:true
scripts.test: npm --prefix packages/rdf-html test && npm --prefix packages/html-rdf-navigator test && npm --prefix packages/browser-extension test && npm --prefix packages/hare-viewer test && npm run test:worker
scripts.test:ae2e: npm run test:ae2e:navigator && npm run test:ae2e:extension
scripts.test:ae2e:extension: npm run test:ae2e:extension:chrome && npm run test:ae2e:extension:firefox && npm run test:ae2e:extension:safari
scripts.test:ae2e:extension:chrome: npm --prefix packages/browser-extension run build:e2e && playwright test --config=playwright.extension.config.ts
scripts.test:ae2e:extension:firefox: npm --prefix packages/browser-extension run build:e2e && node tests/ae2e/extension/firefox/run.mjs
